response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'ギラギラ' (Gira Gira) from on-screen text. 2. Identified performer as Ouro Kronii. 3. Identified original artist as Ado. 4. Searched for official lyrics of 'Gira Gira' by Ado, including romaji and English translation. 5. Compiled the lyrics and structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance by VTuber Ouro Kronii, covering the song 'Gira Gira' originally by Ado.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs a cover of 'Gira Gira', originally by Ado, dancing and singing on a virtual stage. The video includes on-screen lyrics and the title 'Gira Gira' in the top-left corner. The song plays from start to end.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, what a wonderful world
And today once again, I’m confused about my ugliness
Though I still have this feeling to love someone
This is why I suffer
Ugly, honestly my face is like God’s painting using left hand
Inevitably, all the love songs that exist
Are not meant for me
Kisses I can’t use, mercies as I want
Protect myself with the scab of spangles
People don’t love me, so what
Gira Gira, I shine bright and swallow the night
Rap, tap, tap, tap
Just you wait and see my love
1 mg of fireworks that stings my eyes
Drag on, drag on
How funny, the world is so bizarre
Gira Gira, Gira Gira
Unknown, before Buddha even knew
Seems it has already been crazy
Is it the world or myself?
Co-existence has been impossible from the start
Imitations are sad, I ran and ran for my life
Before that strong acid rain washes it off
I embrace my fluorescent bruise
Mera Mera, I blow fire, I’m a wolf of the night
Rap, tap, tap, tap
Stay there and watch me dance
Be strong with the make-up of yours
Flap up, flap up
Unexpectedly, anxiety strikes
Loneliness is the gasoline, I visit obsequious towns
Close my eyes, am I ready? Am I ready?
If God is left-handed, I can’t imagine how happy I’ll be
Gira Gira, I shine bright and swallow the night
Rap, tap, tap, tap
Just you wait and see my love
1 mg of fireworks that stings my eyes
Drag on, drag on
How funny, the world is so bizarre
Gira Gira, Gira Gira
Give love, flowers bloom (Gira Gira)
Nobody can just be the way they are
Ah, what a wonderful world!
Let’s shine on
